name: Steps to take after a workplace slip and fall
description: Steps to take after a workplace slip and fall - Murray

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Slipped on a wet floor? First, report it in writing immediately, even if you feel fine. Take photos of the hazard and get a medical exam right away to link the fall to your job. Keep a log of your pain and missed shifts. If the insurance company starts dragging their feet or downplaying your fall, give us a call at 801-746-0290 to protect your rights.
